zh.lifeSummary: 當Walter Roberts於1438年出生在英國肯特格拉瑟波瑞時，他的父親John Roberts31歲，母親Lady Agnes Buckford Baroness Roberts26歲。他於1463年10月23日與Margaret Penn在英國倫敦結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1522年10月18日之前在英國肯特可藍別盧可，埋葬在英國英格蘭肯特可藍別盧可。

nameMeanings.name: Roberts
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the personal name Robert , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is also occasionally borne by Jews, presumably as an Americanized form of some similar (like-sounding) Jewish surname.

variants.name: Robert
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Marcel, Gilles, Normand, Armand, Lucien, Pierre, Emile, Michel, Edouard, Gaston, Yves.

French, Walloon, English, German, Dutch, Flemish, and Breton (of French origin); Hungarian (Róbert): from the ancient Germanic personal name Ro(d)bert (Middle English Robert, Old French Ro(d)bert), composed of the elements hrōd ‘fame, renown’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. This is found occasionally in Anglo-Saxon England before the Conquest, but in the main it was introduced into England by the Normans and quickly became popular among all classes of society. Pet forms and diminutives are found from an early date, Robin being particularly common. Compare Robair , Robar , Robare , and Rober .
In some cases also an Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames.

variants.name: Roberds
meanings: English: variant of   Roberts  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Robarts
meanings: English (Bedfordshire and Hertfortshire): variant of   Roberts  .

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Walter Roberts was born in 1438, in Glassenbury, Kent, England, his father, John Roberts, was 31 and his mother, Lady Agnes Buckford Baroness Roberts, was 26. He married Margaret Penn on 23 October 1463, in London, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died before 18 October 1522, in Cranbrook, Kent, England, and was buried in Cranbrook, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Walter Roberts est né en 1438, à Glassenbury, Kent, Angleterre, son père, John Roberts, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Lady Agnes Buckford Baroness Roberts, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Penn le 23 octobre 1463, à Londres, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé avant 18 octobre 1522, à Cranbrook, Kent, Angleterre, et a été enterré à Cranbrook, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Lui sposato Margaret Penn il 23 ottobre 1463, nel London, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. ko.lifeSummary: Walter Roberts(이)가 1438년 영국 켄트 글래센버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Roberts(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Agnes Buckford Baroness Roberts(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1463년 10월 23일 영국 런던에서 Margaret Penn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1522년 10월 18일 이전 영국 켄트 크랜브룩에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 크랜브룩에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Walter Roberts nasceu em 1438, em Glassenbury, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Roberts, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Lady Agnes Buckford Baroness Roberts, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Penn em 23 de outubro de 1463, em London, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu antes 18 de outubro de 1522, em Cranbrook, Kent, Inglaterra, e foi sepultado em Cranbrook, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Walter Roberts родился в 1438 г. в местности глассенбури, кэнт, Англия, его отцу по имени John Roberts было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Lady Agnes Buckford Baroness Roberts, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Penn 23 октября 1463 г. в местности Лондон, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер перед 18 октябрь 1522 г. в местности кранбрук, кэнт, Англия и был похоронен в местности кранбрук, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.

Murió antes de 18 de octubre de 1522, en Cranbrook, Kent, Inglaterra, y fue sepultado en Cranbrook, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
